_comment_target: FSDP smoke for legacy_render_variant=v2 (ActionConditionedTembAdapter from embodiment_adapter_v2.py): per-token render features cross-attend over 8-d (joint+gripper) actions, LayerNorm + zero-init Linear, ADD to temb_base, time_proj. NO gates anywhere. Identity-at-init via zero-init out_proj. 10 videos × 2 epochs ≈ 5 min wall-clock. Verifies the v2 plumbing end-to-end before committing to a full run.
_num_frames_note: Bumped 17 → 81 to test Wan's max-supported temporal length. T_lat = 21 latent frames (vs 5 at 17 frames), num_tokens = 21·15·27 = 8,505 (vs 2,025), self-attn O(N²) cost ~17.6× higher per step. The 10-vid subset's smallest video (scene_00001) has 83 mp4 frames which is just barely enough.
_action_note: 8-d state (joint_position 7 + gripper 1) z-scored against train-split stats. At num_frames=81, the action K/V bank for cross_attn is 81 steps — much denser temporal alignment with render Q than at num_frames=17.
_cache_note: Distinct cache from the 17-frame v2 smoke since num_frames is part of the cache key. Will MISS on first launch and rebuild (10 videos at 81 frames takes ~3-5 min through the VAE).
_gate_lr_note: v2 has no gates; the 10× boost on zero_init_params would otherwise apply only to tracks_head.mlp[-1]. Set to 1× since the only zero-init param (out_proj) is a regular Linear and ramps fine without an explicit boost.
